title: The submit button in Forms can´t be changed
excerpt:
Im creating a Form to get leads from our website, and i want to know if its possible to change the color of the submit button, because our web site is blue. 
I think that every company has a unique design on his website,…

posts.author: Miguel97perez (Miguel Angel Pérez Serna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Im creating a Form to get leads from our website, and i want to know if its possible to change the color of the submit button, because our web site is blue.
I think that every company has a unique design on his website, so its important that the color of this button can be changed.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Miguel97perez,

I am afraid it isn’t currently possible to customise the colour of the submit button. I hear where you’re coming from however and encourage you to submit this as a feature request so our community can vote to get it on the roadmap

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Miguel97perez

Nachliel from Easyapps here

If you are looking to receive responses from an embedded form in your website into monday please check out our monday app Easyfrom that allows you to create styled monday forms that embed perfectly. Our form builder allows you to edit the color of any component in the form including the submit button.

here is an example of a form embedded in a WIX page:

In addition to that, we offer:

  • Upload files to your board’s file columns, with support for:
    • Allowing only specific file types, such as images or pdf
    • Limiting the number of files that can be uploaded
    • Setting a maximum for file size
    • Manually retrying uploads if some or all of them failed
  • Set default values for the response item’s hidden group, status, connected board, and dropdown columns. To do so, select Item default values from the Settings menu.
  • Add the item’s group as just another field to the form.
  • Control the page’s top margin with the ability to set different values for desktop and mobile. To do so, select Page from the Settings menu.

Read more about our advance styling options, item default values and more in our comprehensive documentation site.

You can contact us at support@easyappshq.com, and we also provide free training sessions if you need one.

Nachliel

posts.author: Marenatteo (Matteo Arena)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, I’m running into the same issue. It seems a bit contradictory that you can personalize the background and graphics on a form on Monday, but then not have the option to adjust the color of the progress and submit buttons. On top of that, it seems like changing the button colors would be a relatively simple thing to implement.

posts.author: koko (Kortney Cervantes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here is the link to the Feature Request, I had trouble finding it with a search.

Custom CTA Submit Color - Workform Feature requests
Feature to custom the Call to Action button Color in a Monday Workform. Default colour is “violet-pink”.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Miguel97perez

Customizing CTAs in forms is now easier with the intuitive ‘Workform’ builder on monday.com. This builder lets you personalize the graphics and background of forms with minimal script inputs. You can also modify the color of the submit and progress buttons in the forms as per your requirement.

However, for extensive form customization, reaching out to experienced monday.com consulting services provider is advisable.

You can contact us to learn more about our form styling and customization options!

posts.author: adamfowler (Adam Fowler)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to remove the “save as draft” button that magically appeared on our forms? I have went through every setting and hope I am just overlooking this. It is causing havoc with our data entry.
